title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Kgatleng District Council (refuse) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Kgatleng District Council (refuse) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Kgatleng District Council (Refuse) Bye-laws.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content:
2. Application
These Bye-laws shall apply to the village areas set out in Schedule 1 to these Bye-laws and to such village areas as the Council may, by resolution, from time to time, specify:
Provided that no such resolution of the Council shall have force and effect unless 14 days prior notice of such resolution and the terms thereof has been communicated to the inhabitants of any village area affected or likely to be affected by the operation of such resolution.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: furniture, carpets, fridges, rubble which do not fit in a receptacle
waste such as grass clippings, dead flowers, leaves, twigs and other biodegradable waste arising in a garden
health care waste, disposable nappies, batteries, oils, anti-freeze, adhesives, medicines, aerosol cans, bleaches, paints, weed killer and fluorescent tubes
